List invoices

Usage
  fakturownia invoice list

Required Flags

Optional Flags
  --page (int): Requested result page default=1
  --per-page (int): Requested result count per page default=25
  --period (string): Date period filter enum=all,last_12_months,last_30_days,last_month,last_year,more,this_month,this_year
  --date-from (string): Lower date bound for period=more
  --date-to (string): Upper date bound for period=more
  --include-positions (bool): Include invoice positions default=false
  --client-id (string): Filter by client ID
  --invoice-ids (string[]): Filter by specific invoice IDs
  --number (string): Filter by invoice number
  --kind (string[]): Filter by invoice kind
  --search-date-type (string): Date field to search by enum=issue_date,paid_date,transaction_date
  --order (string): Sort order
  --income (string): Income selector enum=no,yes

Global Flags
  --profile (string): Select a named profile
  --json (bool): Alias for --output json default=false
  --output (string): Output format default=human enum=human,json
  --quiet (bool): Emit bare values when exactly one field or column remains default=false
  --fields (string[]): Project JSON envelope data fields
  --columns (string[]): Select human table columns
  --raw (bool): Emit the upstream JSON response body directly when supported default=false
  --dry-run (bool): Accepted on read-only commands and reserved for future mutating request previews default=false
  --timeout-ms (int): HTTP timeout in milliseconds default=30000
  --max-retries (int): Maximum retry attempts for idempotent reads on network or 5xx failures default=2
  --non-interactive (bool): Disable interactive behavior default=true
  --config (string): Override the config file path

Environment Variables
  FAKTUROWNIA_PROFILE: Select a profile unless --profile is provided
  FAKTUROWNIA_URL: Override the base account URL from any profile
  FAKTUROWNIA_API_TOKEN: Override the API token from any profile

Output Modes
  human, json
  raw: supported

Exit Codes
  0: success
  2: usage or validation error
  3: not found
  4: authentication or permission failure
  5: conflict
  6: network or timeout failure
  7: reserved for throttling or retry budget exhaustion
  8: remote API rejected the request
  9: internal CLI failure

Examples
  fakturownia invoice list --json
  fakturownia invoice list --period this_month --columns id,number,buyer_name,price_gross
  fakturownia invoice list --page 2 --per-page 25 --raw

Usage:
  fakturownia invoice list [flags]

Flags:
      --client-id string          filter by client ID
      --date-from string          lower date bound for period=more
      --date-to string            upper date bound for period=more
  -h, --help                      help for list
      --include-positions         include invoice positions
      --income string             income selector
      --invoice-ids strings       filter by specific invoice IDs
      --kind strings              filter by invoice kind
      --number string             filter by invoice number
      --order string              sort order
      --page int                  requested result page (default 1)
      --per-page int              requested result count per page (default 25)
      --period string             date period filter
      --search-date-type string   date field to search by

Global Flags:
      --columns strings   select human table columns
      --config string     override the config file path
      --dry-run           accepted on read-only commands and reserved for future mutating previews
      --fields strings    project JSON envelope data fields
      --json              alias for --output json
      --max-retries int   maximum retries for idempotent reads (default 2)
      --non-interactive   disable interactive behavior (default true)
      --output string     output format: human|json (default "human")
      --profile string    select a named profile
  -q, --quiet             emit bare values when exactly one field or column remains
      --raw               emit the upstream JSON response body directly when supported
      --timeout-ms int    HTTP timeout in milliseconds (default 30000)
